form.formComment: Easy winner leading throughout to score by 8 lengths in a TG1-4W last start at this track, recording an excellent 17.49 over the 305m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Easy winner leading throughout to score by 8 lengths in a TG1-4W last start at this track, recording an excellent 17.49 over the 305m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a half a length winner (17.59) over 305m at this track. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early split and led throughout to score when a half a length winner (17.59) over 305m at this track. Makes plenty of appeal on the back of the latest win.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced with a dislodged muzzle.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Last start finished 5th on March 19 over 305m at this track behind Dimora Bernie beaten 9 lengths (18.19) in a TG1-4W. Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. Last start finished 5th on March 19 over 305m at this track behind Dimora Bernie beaten 9 lengths (18.19) in a TG1-4W. Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked shortly after start; Lost ground approaching turn into home straight.
Slow to begin; Checked first turn.

form.formComment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (17.38) at Murray Bridge Straight in a Grade 6. Has first look at box 5 this time. Will need the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good run, hitting the frame last run (17.38) at Murray Bridge Straight in a Grade 6. Has first look at box 5 this time. Will need the right run.

form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (18.23) when sixth over 305m at this track in a TG1-4W. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Looking to others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame latest (18.23) when sixth over 305m at this track in a TG1-4W. Has performed well off the draw with a win and three places from seven starts. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 9 over 305m at this track behind Aston Deutz beaten half a length (17.62) in a TG1-4W. Looks a solid hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd on April 9 over 305m at this track behind Aston Deutz beaten half a length (17.62) in a TG1-4W. Looks a solid hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide turn off back straight.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 400m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.
